TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: rmanga' zyay' hya' ga rmanga' na kana inbzinah inlungan nqu mkrakis qasa, ini' ga yaqu yaya' na laqi' qasa qu kana inbzinah inlungan naha' maha qu imi' na kay' qani. yalaw gi kya kruma' hya' ga ana maha qutux byacing rnanga' naha' ga, mutuw minbzinah lawziy na' qu inlingan na lpyung, nanu' yasa quw rmanga zyay' qaniy hya' ga, yaquw aki' naha' sawn maha mhway qu lpyung qani maha lga, mutuw naha' blaq lnglungun maha aw' blaq na lpyung qu lpyung qaniy, ruw mutuw si swayal kya la. kya kruma' ga, bsyaq hazi' qu rinngan na lpyung lga, msayux lga mutuw si swayal maha wahiy magal ina' mamu la, yan nasa lga, mutuw t'aring kya pnaynama' mtzyuwaw na agal naha' sa ina' naha' kya la.
S.PHON: rmaŋaʔ zjajʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rmaŋaʔ na kana inβzinaħ inluŋan nqu mkrakis~ɕ qas~ɕa, iniʔ ɣa jaqu jajaʔ na laqiʔ qas~ɕa qu kana inβzinaħ inluŋan naħaʔ maħa qu imiʔ na kajʔ qani. jalaw ɣi kja krumaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ana maħa qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ rnaŋaʔ naħaʔ ɣa, mutuw minβzinaħ lawzij naʔ qu inliŋan na lpjuŋ, nanuʔ jas~ɕa quw rmaŋa zjajʔ qanij ħjaʔ ɣa, jaquw akiʔ naħaʔ s~ɕawn maħa mħwaj qu lpjuŋ qani maħa lɣa, mutuw naħaʔ βlaq lŋluŋun maħa awʔ βlaq na lpjuŋ qu lpjuŋ qanij, ruw mutuw s~ɕi s~ɕwajal kja la. kja krumaʔ ɣa, βs~ɕjaq ħaziʔ qu rinŋan na lpjuŋ lɣa, ms~ɕajux lɣa mutuw s~ɕi s~ɕwajal maħa waħij maɣal inaʔ mamu la, jan nas~ɕa lɣa, mutuw tʔariŋ kja pnajnamaʔ mtzjuwaw na aɣal naħaʔ s~ɕa inaʔ naħaʔ kja la.
S.FORM: rmanga' zyay' hya' ga rmanga' na kana inbzinah inlungan nqu mkrakis qasa, ini' ga yaqu yaya' na laqi' qasa qu kana inbzinah inlungan naha' maha qu imi' na kay' qani. yalaw gi kya kruma' hya' ga ana maha qutux byacing rnanga' naha' ga, mutuw minbzinah lawziy na' qu inlingan na lpyung, nanu' yasa quw rmanga zyay' qaniy hya' ga, yaquw aki' naha' sawn maha mhway qu lpyung qani maha lga, mutuw naha' blaq lnglungun maha aw' blaq na lpyung qu lpyung qaniy, ruw mutuw si swayal kya la. kya kruma' ga, bsyaq hazi' qu rinngan na lpyung lga, msayux lga mutuw si swayal maha wahiy magal ina' mamu la, yan nasa lga, mutuw t'aring kya pnaynama' mtzyuwaw na agal naha' sa ina' naha' kya la.
S.PHON: rmaŋaʔ zjajʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rmaŋaʔ na kana inβzinaħ inluŋan nqu mkrakis~ɕ qas~ɕa, iniʔ ɣa jaqu jajaʔ na laqiʔ qas~ɕa qu kana inβzinaħ inluŋan naħaʔ maħa qu imiʔ na kajʔ qani. jalaw ɣi kja krumaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ana maħa qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ rnaŋaʔ naħaʔ ɣa, mutuw minβzinaħ lawzij naʔ qu inliŋan na lpjuŋ, nanuʔ jas~ɕa quw rmaŋa zjajʔ qanij ħjaʔ ɣa, jaquw akiʔ naħaʔ s~ɕawn maħa mħwaj qu lpjuŋ qani maħa lɣa, mutuw naħaʔ βlaq lŋluŋun maħa awʔ βlaq na lpjuŋ qu lpjuŋ qanij, ruw mutuw s~ɕi s~ɕwajal kja la. kja krumaʔ ɣa, βs~ɕjaq ħaziʔ qu rinŋan na lpjuŋ lɣa, ms~ɕajux lɣa mutuw s~ɕi s~ɕwajal maħa waħij maɣal inaʔ mamu la, jan nas~ɕa lɣa, mutuw tʔariŋ kja pnajnamaʔ mtzjuwaw na aɣal naħaʔ s~ɕa inaʔ naħaʔ kja la.
